fundamentals.name: CoreWeave, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: CoreWeave, Inc. operates as a cloud infrastructure technology company in the United States. The company offers CoreWeave Cloud platform that comprises proprietary software and cloud services that deliver the automation and efficiency needed to manage complex artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure at scale. It also offers data and storage solutions, such as Local Object Transport Accelerator; infrastructure control solutions, including CoreWeave Kubernetes service; mission control services, including node, rack, and fleet lifecycle management; model and agent development tools comprising Weights & Biases, an AI developer platform; and runtime acceleration. In addition, the company offers graphics processing unit compute, CPU compute, networking services, managed services, and virtual and bare metal servers. Its services also include visual effects rendering, machine learning, pixel streaming, and batch processing. The company was formerly known as Atlantic Crypto Corporation and changed its name to CoreWeave, Inc. in December 2019. CoreWeave, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Livingston, New Jersey.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue driven by AI, but currently unprofitable with high debt and negative cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 16.3%; next earnings date is 2026-05-07.
positives: Revenue growth 111.6% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Gross margin 69.4% — strong unit economics on services.
Forward P/E -168.18x suggests high growth expectations, but current losses make it hard to interpret.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $139.16, implying significant upside.
negatives: Operating margin -6.9% and Profit margin -25.6% — currently losing money on operations.
Return on equity -40.7% and Return on assets -0.2% — profitability metrics are deeply negative.
Total debt $35.15B vs $2.27B cash — significant debt burden.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-8.56B — burning significant cash.

news.paragraph: CoreWeave has been actively launching new AI capabilities and solutions, with recent announcements focusing on agentic AI improvement and superintelligence applications. This surge in innovation, coupled with analyst optimism and price predictions suggesting significant upside, points to strong demand for their data center utilization. The company's focus on AI is a clear driver of its growth narrative.
